title: hymenophyllum trichophyllum var. trichophyllum
intro: Hymenophyllum trichophyllum var. trichophyllum, also known as the fern, is a species of small to medium-sized evergreen fern native to Australia. It is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Hymenophyllaceae, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is known for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, treating skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. The herbal preparation of Hymenophyllum trichophyllum var. trichophyllum is typically made into a tea or infusion, which can be used to soothe and calm the skin, as well as to treat various health conditions.
